name: Sandstorm Gold Ltd.
description: Sandstorm Gold Ltd. was a Vancouver-based precious metals royalty and streaming company with a portfolio of approximately 230 royalties and streams across mines in North America, South America, Africa, and Asia-Pacific, of which 41 underlying mines were producing. The company was acquired by Royal Gold, Inc. and delisted from the TSX in October 2025; it no longer trades independently.
